title: Kubernaut Helm Chart Values
description: Schema for validating Kubernaut Helm chart values.yaml

autoscaling.description: HorizontalPodAutoscaler (BR-PLATFORM-003, Issue #1589). autoscaling/v2 is a stable core API — no CRD required.

enabled.description: Create a HorizontalPodAutoscaler for this service

memoryTarget.description: Target average memory utilization percentage (0 disables the memory metric)

fleetOAuth2.description: OAuth2 client credentials for MCP Gateway authentication (ADR-068)

credentialsSecretRef.description: K8s Secret with keys: client-id, client-secret

tlsCAFile.description: Path to a CA bundle for verifying tokenURL's TLS certificate; defaults to the shared inter-service CA when empty

tolerations.description: Pod tolerations (overrides global.tolerations for this component)

serviceLogging.description: Structured logging level for service ConfigMap (Issue #875)

global.description: Global settings applied across all components

registry.description: Container image registry hostname (e.g. quay.io, harbor.corp, image-registry.openshift-image-registry.svc:5000/ns)

namespace.description: Image namespace prefix. Joined to service name by separator.

separator.description: Character joining namespace to service name. Use '/' for nested registries (Harbor, Artifactory), '-' for flat registries (quay.io, Docker Hub).

tag.description: Image tag; empty defaults to Chart.appVersion

digest.description: Image digest (e.g. sha256:abc...); when set, overrides tag for immutable references

imagePullSecrets.description: List of image pull secret names for private registries

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: Shared MCP Gateway endpoint URL, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint is unset

mcpGatewayType.description: Shared MCP Gateway type (eaigw or kuadrant), used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.mcpGatewayType is unset

tlsCAFile.description: Shared CA bundle path for verifying the MCP Gateway's TLS certificate, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.tlsCAFile is unset

tokenURL.description: Shared OAuth2 token URL for MCP Gateway authentication, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.oauth2.tokenURL is unset

credentialsSecretRef.description: Shared Secret name (keys: client-id, client-secret) for MCP Gateway OAuth2, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.oauth2.credentialsSecretRef is unset

scopes.description: Shared OAuth2 scopes for MCP Gateway authentication, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.oauth2.scopes is unset

tlsCAFile.description: Shared CA bundle path for verifying tokenURL's TLS certificate, used as the fallback when a service's own fleet.oauth2.tlsCAFile is unset

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name in resource names

tls.description: TLS certificate management for AuthWebhook and inter-service communication.

mode.description: TLS mode: 'hook' (self-signed via Helm hooks), 'cert-manager' (production, requires cert-manager), or 'manual' (user-managed certificates)

name.description: Name of the Issuer or ClusterIssuer. Usually left empty when tls.mode=cert-manager: auto-selected via `lookup` if exactly one exists in the cluster. Set explicitly for helm template/GitOps rendering or when multiple issuers exist.

interService.description: Issue #678: TLS for inter-service communication (Gateway, DataStorage). Certs are generated by the tls-cert-job hook.

enabled.description: Enable TLS for Gateway and DataStorage server endpoints

certDir.description: Directory containing tls.crt and tls.key for server-side TLS

caFile.description: Path to the CA certificate for client-side trust

gateway.description: Gateway service (AlertManager webhook target + external signal ingestion)

trustedProxyCIDRs.description: Issue #673 L-1: CIDRs whose proxy headers are trusted

cors.description: Issue #1215: CORS configuration (moved from env vars to config YAML)

allowedOrigins.description: Allowed CORS origins. M2M API — deny by default.

allowedMethods.description: HTTP methods allowed for cross-origin requests.

allowCredentials.description: Whether cross-origin requests may include credentials.

signalSources.description: External signal sources that need RBAC to call the Gateway

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: MCP Gateway endpoint URL for federated scope checks. Required when fleet.enabled=true; falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint when unset

mcpGatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw or kuadrant. Falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayType when unset

tlsCAFile.description: Path to a CA bundle for verifying the MCP Gateway's TLS certificate. Falls back to global.fleet.tlsCAFile, then to the shared inter-service CA, when unset

tokenSecretRef.description: K8s Secret (key: token) with an ACM Search bearer token (backend=acm). NOT YET FUNCTIONAL pending Issue #1556 (Go-side FleetConfig support).

maxBodySize.description: #1048 Phase 4 / SC-5: Maximum request body size in bytes

signerCertDir.description: #1048 Phase 5 / AU-9: Directory containing signing cert (tls.crt, tls.key)

rateLimit.description: GAP-09 (Issue #1505) / SC-5: Per-IP rate limiting for the DS HTTP API. Disabled by default.

dlqMaxLen.description: #1048 Phase 5 / AU-11: Redis DLQ MAXLEN bound

tls.description: #1048 Phase 5 / AU-9: Redis TLS client configuration

caFile.description: CA bundle to verify Redis server

enabled.description: Enable periodic purge of expired audit events

interval.description: How often the retention worker runs

defaultDays.description: Application-level default retention in days (ADR-034: 7 years)

auditHashKey.description: GAP-05 (Issue #1505) / AU-9: Optional keyed HMAC-SHA256 audit hash chain

enabled.description: Enable keyed HMAC-SHA256 hash chaining (requires a pre-created Secret)

existingSecret.description: Pre-created Secret name; defaults to datastorage-audit-hmac-key when unset

secretKey.description: Key name within the secret's audit-hmac-key.yaml file

dbExistingSecret.description: DEPRECATED: db-secrets.yaml is now in postgresql-secret. Set only for BYO PostgreSQL with a separate DataStorage secret.

policies.description: Approval policy externalization. Provide content via --set-file or reference an existing ConfigMap.
Classification policy externalization (ADR-060). Provide content via --set-file or reference an existing ConfigMap.

content.description: Raw Rego policy content. Inject via --set-file signalprocessing.policies.content=policy.rego

existingConfigMap.description: Pre-existing ConfigMap with key 'policy.rego'. Mutually exclusive with 'content'.

endpoint.description: MCP Gateway endpoint URL for remote cluster resource reads

mcpGatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw or kuadrant; required to evaluate the cluster classification dimension. Falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayType when unset

namespace.description: Restricts the ClusterRegistry CRD watch; empty watches all namespaces

ineffectiveChainThreshold.description: Ineffective workflow chain length before escalation

stabilizationWindow.description: Time for system stabilization after remediation before assessment

gitOpsSyncDelay.description: Expected time for GitOps tool (ArgoCD/Flux) to sync changes to cluster

operatorReconcileDelay.description: Expected time for operator to reconcile after CR update

proactiveAlertDelay.description: Extra delay for proactive alert resolution

notifySelfResolved.description: Emit status-update notification when signal self-resolves (BR-ORCH-037 AC-037-08)

period.description: Duration before terminal RemediationRequests are cleaned up

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: MCP Gateway endpoint URL for reading remote resource specs (spec hash). Required when fleet.enabled=true; falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint when unset

mcpGatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw or kuadrant. Falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayType when unset

tlsCAFile.description: Path to a CA bundle for verifying the MCP Gateway's TLS certificate. Falls back to global.fleet.tlsCAFile, then to the shared inter-service CA, when unset

tokenSecretRef.description: K8s Secret (key: token) with an ACM Search bearer token (backend=acm). NOT YET FUNCTIONAL pending Issue #1556 (Go-side FleetConfig support).

tekton.description: Tekton Pipelines engine configuration (issue #868). Omit for auto-discovery.

enabled.description: true or omit = auto-discover CRDs; false = disable Tekton engine

ansible.description: AWX/AAP connectivity for the ansible executor (issue #478). Omit to disable.

apiURL.description: AWX/AAP API base URL (required when ansible is enabled)

tokenSecretRef.description: Reference to a K8s Secret containing the AWX API token

namespace.description: Namespace of the Secret (empty = release namespace)

caCertSecretRef.description: BR-PLATFORM-005: reference to a K8s Secret containing a PEM-encoded CA certificate for the AAP/AWX API endpoint. Set when AAP/AWX uses a self-signed or private-CA certificate (Kubernaut Operator parity). If omitted, only the system trust store + inter-service CA are trusted.

key.description: Key within the Secret containing the PEM CA certificate

slack.description: Slack quickstart shortcut. Auto-generates routing and credential projection when secretName is set.

secretName.description: K8s Secret containing Slack webhook URL. Empty = no Slack.

secretKey.description: Key within the Secret that holds the webhook URL.

routing.description: Notification routing externalization. Provide content via --set-file or reference an existing ConfigMap.

stabilizationWindow.description: Time to wait after remediation before assessing effectiveness

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: MCP Gateway endpoint URL for remote cluster reads. Optional; falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint when unset

mcpGatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw or kuadrant. Falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayType when unset

tlsCAFile.description: Path to a CA bundle for verifying the MCP Gateway's TLS certificate. Falls back to global.fleet.tlsCAFile, then to the shared inter-service CA, when unset

credentialsSecretName.description: Name of the pre-existing K8s Secret containing LLM API credentials (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY)

provider.description: LLM provider name. Static — requires pod restart. NOT currently supported: bedrock (tracked in #1582), azure (tracked in #1600) — for Mistral/Ollama/HuggingFace TGI/self-hosted vLLM or LlamaStack, use 'openai_compatible' with `endpoint` set to the provider's OpenAI-Chat-Completions-compatible base URL instead of a dedicated provider value.

vertexProject.description: GCP project ID. Required for vertex_ai provider. Static — requires pod restart.

vertexLocation.description: GCP region (e.g. us-central1). Required for vertex_ai provider. Static — requires pod restart.

azureApiVersion.description: Reserved for future Azure OpenAI support (#1600) — NOT currently consumed by any code path. Setting this has no effect today.

bedrockRegion.description: Reserved for future Bedrock support (#1582) — NOT currently consumed by any code path. Setting this has no effect today.

tlsCaFile.description: Path to PEM CA cert for internal LLM endpoints behind private CA. Static — requires pod restart.

maxRetries.description: Max retries for LLM requests. Hot-reloadable.

timeoutSeconds.description: LLM request timeout in seconds. Hot-reloadable.

oauth2.description: OAuth2 client credentials grant for enterprise LLM gateway authentication.

enabled.description: Enable OAuth2 client credentials token acquisition for LLM requests.

tokenURL.description: OAuth2 token endpoint URL (e.g. Keycloak, Azure AD).

credentialsSecretRef.description: K8s Secret name containing client-id and client-secret keys.

alignmentCheck.description: Shadow agent alignment check (#601): parallel audit for prompt injection detection.

maxStepTokens.description: Max evaluator response tokens per step.

llm.description: Optional separate LLM config for alignment evaluation. Omit to reuse investigation LLM.

provider.description: Same provider support constraints as ai.llm.provider above (bedrock/azure not currently supported).

interactive.description: MCP interactive mode (#703): enables human-in-the-loop investigation sessions.

enabled.description: Enable MCP interactive mode endpoint and Lease-based session management.

sessionTTL.description: Maximum duration for an interactive session before auto-release.

maxConcurrentSessions.description: Maximum concurrent interactive sessions per instance.

rateLimitPerUser.description: Maximum requests per second per authenticated user.

maxAnalyzingTimeout.description: Extended analyzing timeout for RO when an interactive session is active. Prevents RO from timing out a RemediationRequest while an operator is investigating.

jwtProviders.description: JWT providers for Pattern B authentication (DD-AUTH-MCP-001 v2.0).

issuer.description: JWT issuer URL (must match iss claim).

jwksURL.description: JWKS endpoint URL for signature verification.

groups.description: JWT claim for groups extraction (supports dot-notation).

postgresql.description: PostgreSQL (DataStorage backend). Set enabled=false to use external host/port (BYO #256)

enabled.description: Set false to skip in-chart PostgreSQL and use external host/port instead

host.description: External PostgreSQL host. Required when enabled=false.

existingSecret.description: Pre-created Secret name with POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB, db-secrets.yaml keys. Empty = expect 'postgresql-secret'.

valkey.description: Valkey (DataStorage DLQ). Redis-compatible in-memory store. Set enabled=false to use external host/port (BYO #256)

enabled.description: Set false to skip in-chart Valkey and use external host/port instead

host.description: External Valkey host. Required when enabled=false.

existingSecret.description: Pre-created Secret name with valkey-secrets.yaml key. Empty = expect 'valkey-secret'.

fleetmetadatacache.description: FleetMetadataCache: Fleet Metadata Cache service (BR-INTEGRATION-065, ADR-068)

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: Required when fleetmetadatacache.enabled=true; falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint when unset

gatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw (Envoy AI Gateway) or kuadrant (Kuadrant MCP Gateway)

oauth2.description: OAuth2 client_credentials for MCP Gateway authentication. Required when fleetmetadatacache.enabled=true — there is no unauthenticated fallback.

credentialsSecretRef.description: Secret with client-id and client-secret keys (REQUIRED)

apifrontend.description: API Frontend (MCP bridge between users and Kubernaut Agent)

mcpGatewayEndpoint.description: MCP Gateway endpoint URL for remote cluster reads. Optional; falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayEndpoint when unset

mcpGatewayType.description: MCP Gateway type: eaigw or kuadrant. Falls back to global.fleet.mcpGatewayType when unset

tlsCAFile.description: Path to a CA bundle for verifying the MCP Gateway's TLS certificate. Falls back to global.fleet.tlsCAFile, then to the shared inter-service CA, when unset

issuerURL.description: OIDC issuer URL for JWT validation. When set, OIDC/JWKS auth is used. When empty, K8s TokenReview is auto-detected.

jwtProviders.description: Multi-provider JWT configuration (#1436). When set, takes precedence over issuerURL/audience.

issuerURL.description: OIDC issuer URL (must match JWT iss claim)

jwksURL.description: JWKS endpoint URL (optional, defaults to issuerURL)

username.description: Claim path or CEL expression for username

groups.description: Claim path or CEL expression for groups

replayCache.description: GAP-08 (Issue #1505): distributed jti replay-detection backend, shared across all APIFrontend replicas via the cluster's Valkey instance. Disabled by default (legacy in-memory, single-process cache).

redisDB.description: Valkey logical DB index used for replay cache keys

personas.description: Map of persona name to list of allowed tool names for SAR-based authorization

enabled.description: Enable Prometheus integration for both EM and KA

tlsCaFile.description: Path to PEM CA bundle for HTTPS.
Path to PEM CA bundle for HTTPS.

serviceMonitor.description: ServiceMonitor resources for scraping each service's /metrics endpoint (BR-PLATFORM-003, Issue #1589). Requires monitoring.coreos.com/v1 CRD (kube-prometheus-stack) — no-op when absent, even if enabled=true. Not rendered for authwebhook (metrics intentionally disabled).

enabled.description: Create ServiceMonitor resources for all metrics-emitting services

prometheusRule.description: PrometheusRule resource for interactive session SLO alerting (Issue #1005), and for DataStorage/APIFrontend availability/latency/error alerting (BR-PLATFORM-003, Issue #1589)

enabled.description: Create PrometheusRule resources (interactive session SLOs, DataStorage/APIFrontend alerting)

additionalLabels.description: Additional labels for PrometheusRule (e.g. prometheus: kube-prometheus)

activeSessionsMax.description: Max concurrent interactive sessions before alerting

activeSessionsFor.description: Duration threshold must be exceeded before firing

commandDurationP99Max.description: Max p99 command duration in seconds

networkPolicies.description: NetworkPolicy configuration for all Kubernaut services (Issue #285)

enabled.description: Enable default-deny NetworkPolicies for all services

apiServerCIDR.description: K8s API server real backend endpoint IP as a /32 CIDR (e.g., 10.89.0.2/32) -- NOT the 'kubernetes' Service ClusterIP, which most CNIs ignore for NetworkPolicy egress. Usually left empty: auto-discovered via `lookup` during a real helm install/upgrade. Set explicitly only for helm template/GitOps rendering, restricted-RBAC installers, or to override discovery. Use for single-control-plane clusters; use apiServerCIDRs for HA.

apiServerCIDRs.description: Additional K8s API server backend endpoint IPs as /32 CIDRs, for HA clusters with multiple control-plane nodes. Merged with apiServerCIDR. Usually left empty (see apiServerCIDR).

apiServerPort.description: Port the K8s API server's real backend endpoint(s) listen on (commonly 6443), not necessarily the 'kubernetes' Service's port (443). 0 means auto-discover via `lookup` (falls back to 443 if unavailable).

prometheusPort.description: Prometheus port to allow in the NetworkPolicy egress rule

alertManagerPort.description: AlertManager port to allow in the NetworkPolicy egress rule

cidr.description: CIDR for external webhook endpoints (Slack, PagerDuty, Teams)
CIDR for OCI container registry egress (datastorage bundle validation)

ingressNamespaces.description: Namespaces allowed to send ingress to Gateway (e.g., monitoring for AlertManager)
Namespaces allowed to send ingress to APIFrontend (e.g., an ingress-controller namespace)

console.description: BR-PLATFORM-006: NetworkPolicy toggle for the web console. A no-op when console.enabled=false.

ingressNamespaces.description: Namespaces allowed to send ingress to the console (e.g., an ingress-controller namespace)
